TanziAI – RFF to ATO NOI & Downsizer Prefill v3.1

Upload the RFF, choose the client from page 1, then generate the NOI and Downsizer PDF using image-based templates for accurate box alignment.

1. Upload RFF

Waiting for RFF upload.

2. Choose client

3. Check extracted details

4. Form details

Signature and signature date sections are deliberately left blank. Select a saved fund/product to auto-fill ABN and USI, or choose Other / manual entry.

Ready to generate.

Included form templates

ATO NOI NAT 71121ATO Downsizer NAT 75073Image-based PDF outputOne character per box

The NOI template is embedded as page images, then the app places individual characters into the printed boxes rather than overlaying loose text on top of the PDF.
